diagrams.title: Symbol Graph
diagrams.summary: Shows repository files and symbol nodes for classes, functions, constants, and other extracted symbols.

diagrams.title: High-Level Architecture
diagrams.summary: Shows top domains, representative files, and project document count from the persisted heart model.

diagrams.title: Class Diagram
diagrams.summary: Shows extracted classes, interfaces, enums, and basic inheritance or implementation relationships when available.

diagrams.title: Sequence Diagram
diagrams.summary: Shows a best-effort interaction flow derived from relevant files, imports, linked documents, and reuse targets.
